product: Dashboard data selection and point maps
tagline: Select and add multiple tables and views: Users can now select and add multiple tables and views at once from the Add data dialog.
what_it_does: Select and add multiple tables and views: Users can now select and add multiple tables and views at once from the Add data dialog. Draft dashboard scheduling bug fix: Fixed a bug that allowed draft dashboards to be scheduled using the API. Now, only published dashboards can be scheduled.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Select and add multiple tables and views: Users can now select and add multiple tables and views at once from the Add data dialog. Draft dashboard scheduling bug fix: Fixed a bug that allowed draft dashboards to be scheduled using the API.
key_takeaway: Select and add multiple tables and views: Users can now select and add multiple tables and views at once from the Add data dialog.
